description: Autonomous forensic crypto agent running 24/7 on GCP VPS. 8-step pipeline every 2h: collects on-chain data, computes 65+ forensic metrics, runs hybrid privacy AI analysis (Llama 3.3 70B private + Gemini 3 Flash anonymized via Venice AI), autonomously trades via self-custody wallet on Base, publishes intelligence gated by x402 micropayments.

step0.name: check_position.py
step0.action: Close open positions > T+90min via bankr sell

step0b.name: check_balance.py
step0b.action: Venice AI billing check — log credits remaining

step1.name: collector.py
step1.action: Fetch on-chain data for 19 tokens — Moralis + GeckoTerminal + DexScreener, OHLCV 1H + 15min

step2.name: report_builder.py + forensic_engine_v5
step2.action: Compute 65+ forensic metrics per token, dual-timeframe analysis (1H + 15min), phase detection

step2b.name: signal_tracker.py
step2b.action: Llama 3.3 70B (PRIVATE, no data retention) — compare current vs N-1 cycle, detect momentum shifts, whale entries, volume anomalies → signals.json

step3.name: request_analysis.py
step3.action: Gemini 3 Flash Preview (ANONYMIZED) — inject signals.json + memories + DECISIONS.md → CES ranking, entry zones, whale watch → synthesis.json

step3b.name: enter_new_position.py
step3b.action: Parse top CES token → RULE_BOOK filters (ICR, Top5, Phase, BPI, FHS) → swap 75% ETH via bankr on-chain

step4.name: export_memory_json.py
step4.action: Bundle 65 fields + forensic_report per token → memory.json

step5.name: push_to_github.py + push_memory_github.py
step5.action: Publish data.json, memory.json, signals.json, synthesis.json to GitHub Pages

steps.action: Collected 17 tokens — 85 API calls (Moralis + GeckoTerminal 1H + 15min + DexScreener)
signal_tracker.py — Llama 3.3 70B PRIVATE — 7 signals detected (MOLT weakening, BUNKER invalidated, BNKRW/FELIX new flags)
request_analysis.py — Gemini 3 Flash ANONYMIZED — CES ranking: CLANKER=55, JUNO=42, MOLT=35
enter_new_position — parsed BUNKER from TOP 3 — RULE_BOOK filter: Phase DISTRIBUTION → trade blocked
Push data.json + memory.json + signals.json + synthesis.json to GitHub Pages

buildingPhaseLog.changes: Hackathon registration. Initial Devfolio publish. Pipeline v1 (5 steps). Self-custody wallet setup via Bankr.
ERC-8004 Agent #32715 registered on Base. agent.json published. x402 paywall implemented ($0.02 dashboard, $0.05 synthesis).
Signal tracker added (Step 2b). Llama 3.3 70B private inference via Venice AI. Hybrid privacy model validated by Venice team (Lorenzo Fränkel).
Trading pipeline connected: enter_new_position.py + check_position.py. RULE_BOOK filters. First autonomous trade executed (AntiHunter sold → USDC).
PROMPT_ANALYSIS.md switched to full English. API keys removed from repo, .env created. Moltbook post published.
Landing page redesigned. Signal Tracker panel added to dashboard. report.html font/color improvements.
request_analysis.py v2: reads market_data for real prices/volumes. Directive anti-reasoning added to PROMPT. Venice billing check (Step 0b) integrated.

changes: Forensic engine bug fixes: SI (was always 33% → rolling bandwidth_max), TCI (was always 0 → multi-signal scoring), FCI (was 0/50 → unknown whale + balance clustering)
OHLCV 15min added to collector (96 candles/token). Dual-timeframe RSI/SI in forensic engine. BPI boost from 15min squeeze.
enter_new_position parser: 5-level fallback (INJECTION PRIORITAIRE → **SYMBOL** CES → CES ranking → #1/TOP1 → first $SYMBOL)
push_to_github.py: signals.json now pushed every cycle
Landing page v3: expanded hero, 8-step workflow with Llama 70B, detailed x402 services, unified purple for Venice AI, metrics guide, GitHub link
report.html: CES parsing from raw_report, memory.json enrichment (ICR/top5_pct/whale_watch), Signal Tracker standalone section
Reading guide 'How to Read the Dashboard' added to landing

errorLog.error: enter_new_position: 'Impossible de parser INJECTION PRIORITAIRE' — Venice AI did not put INJECTION PRIORITAIRE as first line
errorLog.resolution: Added 5-level fallback parser: catches **BUNKER** - CES: 72/100 format from TOP 3 section

errorLog.error: SI metric always returned 33.33% — bandwidth_max was hardcoded to bandwidth * 1.5
errorLog.resolution: Implemented _bw_max() using rolling window computation over all OHLCV candles

errorLog.error: TCI metric always returned 0 — depended on 'entity' field rarely populated by Moralis
errorLog.resolution: Multi-signal scoring: contract ratio + entity clustering + address prefix patterns + balance tier analysis

errorLog.error: FCI metric was binary 0/50 — simplistic entity label check
errorLog.resolution: Unknown whale concentration + balance clustering among top holders. Tested: AntiHunter returns FCI=35

errorLog.error: Trade DRB: position.json written BEFORE bankr confirmation — trade failed but position marked OPEN
errorLog.resolution: position.json now written ONLY after bankr tx confirmation

errorLog.error: FELIX token missed 3x breakout — flow classification logic prevented EARLY_BREAKOUT detection
errorLog.resolution: Added EARLY_BREAKOUT phase and NBP volume override to forensic engine

toolInteractions.purpose: Token holder data, wallet balances, top 20 holders
DEX pair data, price, volume, transactions
Autonomous swap execution on Base DEX, self-custody
Push data.json + memory.json + signals.json + synthesis.json to Pages

keyMetrics.forensicEngine: v5 — 65+ metrics including FHS, NBP, ICR, LCR, BPI, WCC, SI, TCI, FCI, DAI, LVR, RSI, Bollinger, bull flag detection
keyMetrics.dualTimeframe: Hourly (24 candles) + 15min (96 candles) — RSI_15m, SI_15m feed into BPI for short-term breakout detection
keyMetrics.tradeRules: RULE_BOOK: ICR < 10, Top5 < 50%, Phase != DISTRIBUTION, BPI > 1.5, FHS > 6.0, Price change < 25%
keyMetrics.autoClose: Positions auto-close at T+90min via check_position.py
keyMetrics.paywall: x402 USDC on Base — $0.02 per-token dashboard, $0.05 global synthesis report
keyMetrics.onChainSeal: SHA256 hash of each synthesis report stored on-chain ($0.01 USDC to Forensic Wallet)
